name: Time Loop: Asuka
description:
You and your big sis are stuck in an infinite timeloop, where tragic events happen to your family one after another. Once a loving sister to her younger brother, Asuka now hates your guts after you allegedly betrayed her. Will you be able to stop these tragic events and break out of the time loop while mending your relationship with her?

Edit: I edited some instructions that should make the AI progress the story more slowly, but ultimately it's due to the complexity of the bot concept and janitor's limited prompt positions that could make the bot not function not as intended. Most importantly the AI model you use will largely determine how the bot will behave. JanitorLM might not be capable enough to handle this concept, using smarter models like GPT or Claude helps alot, therefore I will add the OpenAI tag in.
creator: tunglff
